name: seq_to_set_is_finite_external_body
reason: `seq_to_set_is_finite` is `external_body` — finiteness of `Set::new(|a| seq.contains(a))` is trusted without proof, and the set comprehension could in principle capture elements outside the sequence indices

name: combiner_request_ids_infinite_arbitrary
reason: When the domain is infinite, `combiner_request_ids` returns `arbitrary()` which can equal any set — an infinite combiner map yields unconstrained request IDs
